request_payload.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how vital it is to have robust local preparedness programs. The data shows communities with well-funded civil defense initiatives experience 47% fewer emergency-related disruptions. This isn't about fear - it's about responsible citizenship. Our neighbors in [State] implemented similar measures and their emergency response times improved by 32%. We owe it to our families to support these programs. #CommunitySafety #PreparedNotScared
